styles.positive_style_prompt: restrained documentary-surreal image, one clear subject or scene, subject remains recognizable after simplification, one dominant anomaly or contradiction, controlled palette, restrained lighting, clear silhouette, low clutter, non-spectacular tension
styles.negative_prompt: text, watermark, logo, ui overlay, crowded scene, many small objects, unreadable background detail, motion blur, action pose, blockbuster cinematic lighting, poster design, collage fragments, multiple surreal events, competing bright accents, zipper artifact, black seam scar, floating artifact above the nose, cutaway diagram, isolated ring icon, evidence bench spread, burn scar, active leak, ignition, smoke, soot arc

cases.prompt_body: Documentary mid-stack portrait of Space Shuttle Challenger on the launch pad during cold prelaunch readiness, lower orbiter, orange external tank, and white booster geometry remain canonical and calm, clean tank skin with no zipper-like seam artifact and no floating blemish above the shuttle nose, routine vent calm, no anomaly burden in this frame, muted blue-gray dawn, restrained industrial stillness

Locked shuttle-on-pad context frame from the lower orbiter through the launch platform, Challenger stack remains fully recognizable and text-clean, external tank surface reads clean and intact, no dark zipper artifact, no extra mark above the nose, cold morning pad readiness, no evidence cutaway, no active failure, no spectacle

Machine-in-pad portrait of Challenger held in routine prelaunch calm, camera tightened around the lower orbiter, orange tank, and nearby service structure, stack geometry remains canonical, tank skin and nose area stay clean without stray black artifacts, restrained vent atmosphere only, this segment carries context rather than visible damage, pale dawn light, muted blue, bone white, charcoal
